title: Tools, Resources, Prompts, and Server Instructions · Protocol Repair Bay
summary: Design a minimal MCP surface for an internal knowledge and action service. Learners isolate plausible failures, compare competing hypotheses, and record cause-level repair evidence. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in an MCP primitive and naming contract and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Expose actions as narrow tools with descriptive schemas and side-effect annotations.
Expose readable addressable context as resources or templates rather than action tools.
Expose reusable user-controlled prompt templates only when they improve discovery and composition.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
